summary: Iteration 2 PLUMBLINE re-test: all new admin features pass. Backend 10/10 pytest cases pass (root→PLUMBLINE, settings GET/PATCH auto-create, settings cost flows into dashboard ROI, jobs CRUD with cascade, tasks CRUD with cascade, common-mistakes create/filter/delete, dashboard leaderboard shape + sort, admin/reset wipes & reseeds 115 tasks while keep_settings=true preserves settings, final /seed idempotent). Frontend: Onboarding shows PLUMBLINE 5xl orange + 'BUILD TO THE PLUMBLINE. ZERO REWORK.' tagline (gold). Manager lands on Command (dashboard) — default-view fix verified. Admin tab visible only for manager (crew has no tab-admin, lands on Field). SuperAdmin shows all 5 sections (admin-section-{settings,jobs,tasks,mistakes,danger}); Settings save persists (verified cost 850→1500 via API, then restored to 850); Jobs panel has create/edit/delete with 1 job; Tasks panel: 115 tasks render, search filters to 37 'install', task-create/edit/save/delete testids present; Mistakes panel: add-btn + 7 delete-{id} rows; Danger Zone admin-reset-btn present and visible. ROI cost-per-check on dashboard reflects current settings value.

issues: After admin/reset, dashboard shows ROI tile '$0' with stat squares 0/0/$0.0k — visually correct but the empty 30-day chart line sits flush on the $0 baseline. Cosmetic only; populates once entries exist.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py /api/admin/reset accepts keep_settings as a query param (FastAPI default True). Confirmed via test that settings.rework_cost_per_check=999 is preserved across reset. Good.
get_settings() auto-creates the singleton on first GET — robust, no 404 ever. Patch uses upsert so even a clean DB works.
Dashboard ROI now reads cost_per_check and photo_audit_value from settings on EVERY call. Recompute on settings change confirmed live.
Leaderboard sort is stable & desc by score; pass_rate computed safely (guards /0). Score formula: pr*100 + log(failed+1)*12 + log(photos+1)*6 — rewards both quality and engagement.
Job & Task DELETE cascades verified (validation-steps and task_entries wiped). Good data hygiene.
Common-mistakes filter by category works; category param is exact-match (case-sensitive). Document or normalize if free-text categories are added later.

test_kreteops_api.py iteration-1 file had a hardcoded fallback URL in BASE_URL default — fixed test_root assertion to 'PLUMBLINE'. Kept the fallback (not blocking) but new iter-2 test file uses os.environ[...] without default per env policy.
Frontend default-view derived from localStorage role at App.js mount works for both manager (→ dashboard) and crew (→ field). Verified.

All required data-testids present: tab-admin, super-admin, admin-section-*, settings-cost-per-check, settings-photo-value, settings-save-btn, job-create-btn, job-edit-*, job-save-btn, job-delete-*, admin-tasks-search, task-create-btn, task-edit-*, task-save-btn, task-delete-*, mistake-add-btn, mistake-delete-*, admin-reset-btn, leaderboard, lb-row-*.
test_credentials: No auth. localStorage keys: kreteops_role (crew|manager), kreteops_name (any string). Used 'Test Mgr 2026' (manager) and 'Test Crew 2026' (crew).
seed_data_creation: After final /api/admin/reset test the demo was re-seeded automatically (115 tasks, default validation steps, common mistakes). zzz_final_seed_idempotent confirms 115 tasks present. Settings restored to default rework_cost_per_check=850, photo_audit_value=75 at end of UI run via PATCH.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run: `REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=<url> pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v`. Both test files green. /api/admin/reset takes ~1s; AI tests in iter-1 file may need 90s timeout. Dashboard leaderboard ONLY renders when entries>0 — after a reset the section is hidden by design. To exercise leaderboard UI, create a task_entry first via FieldView or curl. Iter-2 reset clears all task_entries, so iter-1 TEST_ entries from the previous run are gone (expected, per problem statement).
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found across all iter-2 features.
